Review content: The Roostertail has been an absolutely wonderful experience for our agency at Accounting Aid Society. Their hospitality is flawless, and the accommodations are exceptional. The entire team works seamlessly together, creating a welcoming and polished atmosphere that elevates every event. We are incredibly proud to have hosted our last two most important engagements at this stunning venue. A special thank you to Nicole and Colleen—your professionalism and warmth made the experience even more memorable. We are forever grateful!"

The Roostertail is an amazing venue! My daughter just had her wedding reception there and it was top shelf 100%!The service, the food, and the view were all extraordinary! We were in such good hands with Nicole Spicuzza Director of event sales. She was easy to get a hold of and addressed all of our concerns throughout the wedding preparation process.I highly recommend the Roostertail for your wedding reception!Mother of the bride

Another spectacular Echo Global Logistcs 2024 Holiday Party last weekend! Once again The Roostertail created a magical evening for us! Nicole Spicuzza, Mike Schoenith and Mr. Schoenith made sure every detail was thought out and created to what our needs were. We love being a part of The Roostertail family, thank you once again for a memorable evening! ❤️Our company, Echo Global Logistics had our "After The Holiday's Holiday Party there on January 12, 2024. It was absolutely spectacular! It was decorated so beautiful, it was a Winter Wonderland with special touches around every corner! Nicole and her team were on top of everything and treated us all like royalty, literally, what an amazing staff they have! The food was so delicious, everyone loved the selection of food stations that we chose, the hit of the night was the Chicken/Steak Fajita Station and the Soul Food Station! Again they went above and beyond with the food and the specialty drinks! We will definitely be having more events there for sure!  Thank you so much to Nicole Spicuzza, Mike Schoenith and the staff for making our event so incredible!

We chose The Roostertail to host our 25th Anniversary Christmas Celebration! After spending a quarter century helping brides find their perfect dress, it was incredibly special to have our entire team dressed up and celebrating together in such an iconic venue.The Roostertail team went above and beyond to make our milestone celebration a night to remember. From the moment we walked in, we felt like honored guests, and their exceptional service made everyone feel special.There's something poetic about a team that spends their days creating magical moments for brides getting to experience their own enchanted evening. The Roostertail team understood this significance and elevated our celebration beyond what we could have imagined.We couldn't have chosen a better venue or team to host this meaningful occasion. Thank you for making our 25th Anniversary Celebration an evening we'll always treasure. We're already looking forward to our next opportunity to celebrate at the Roostertail!

What a joy it was to attend The Wedding Shoppe's 25th Anniversary Christmas Celebration at the Roostertail! For 25 years, our team has been focused on making brides' dreams come true, always celebrating their special moments. But this evening was different – it was our turn to celebrate together, and the Roostertail made it absolutely perfect.There was something magical about seeing our entire team dressed up and enjoying each other's company, rather than bustling about helping brides find their perfect gowns. We spend our days creating special moments for others, and the Roostertail team clearly understood how meaningful it was for us to finally have our own celebration.The venue was stunning, but what truly made the evening exceptional was the incredible Roostertail staff. Their warmth and attentiveness showed in every detail, and the food was absolutely outstanding! It was clear they put as much care into making our celebration special as we put into helping our brides find their dream dresses.To the entire Roostertail team: thank you for giving us an unforgettable evening where we could step away from being the celebrators and actually be the celebrated. After 25 years of creating magical moments for others, you helped us create a beautiful moment of our own. You gave us the perfect space to reflect on our journey, celebrate our achievements, and most importantly, enjoy each other's company.This wasn't just an anniversary party – it was a chance for our team to come together and celebrate the thousands of dreams we've helped come true over the past quarter century. The Roostertail provided the perfect backdrop for such a meaningful milestone, and we couldn't be more grateful for their exceptional service and attention to detail.

We recently hosted The Masonic Temple Detroit's holiday party at the Roostertail, and it was truly an unforgettable experience! The staff was absolutely amazing—going above and beyond to make sure our entire team felt spoiled and celebrated all night long. The food was nothing short of delicious, and the atmosphere was spectacular, offering the perfect setting for our celebration. Every detail was handled with care and professionalism, making the night seamless and enjoyable. We can't recommend the Roostertail enough for any special event. A special thank you to Nicole and her whole team! Thank you from the bottom of our hearts for making our holiday party so memorable!
Great place to have an event
What a wonderful job the rooster tail did on the VA local Christmas party.
Very beautifully decorated. Loved the food and atmosphere.

The venue was decorated wonderfully for our gala. The staff was very pleasant and efficient. Food was great and tasty! Hats off to the chef and his team. Shauna was an absolute wonder! She and her staff ensured we didn't want for anything! Top notch customer service.

SHAWNA, Words cannot express how much I adore you!! You really exceeded my expectations for our 1st ever Holiday Gala! The service was amazing and TOP NOTCH. From beginning to end. Over 600 members were blown away by the service they had at the ROOSTERTAIL. Ava was such a sweetheart too. She made sure my BLUE champagne glass was filled to the rim. If I could rate them a million stars I would. Shawna's thee best, HANDS DOWN!!! The holiday decor made me feel like I was a kid again. Keep up the great work! Happy Holidays.

I work as a photo booth attendant for Prestige Weddings and Events, I have only worked a handful of events hosted at Roostertail. Every time I am there, I am met with nothing but kind staff who are willing to lend a helping hand. The last time I was there, one of the managers walked me to my car and helped me load my equipment due to a rain storm that was approaching, they care about their vendors and their couples!

Bravo!! 👏🏼 Roostertail and everyone involved went above and beyond for our Employee party! Nicole, our main coordinator, was amazing and you can tell she thoroughly enjoys her job shown by her positivity and enthusiasm. We have been planning together since July and she always was quick to respond and manage all of our needs. The day of the party, Nicole always checked up on us and stayed until the end making sure everything was perfect! We also got to meet the owner and his son who were very welcoming and thankful. We met Chef, in which the food he prepared was so tasty and cooked to perfection!  To our surprise, they had their beautiful water feature turned on that is seen through windows surrounding the DJ stage. It was a wonderful display and all our guests loved it! Lastly, the woman’s bathroom is a site to see on its own!! All the woman were taking pics/selfies in there all night! I would highly recommend Roostertail to anyone looking for a class act venue with a one of a kind location right on the Detroit River!
The atmosphere was phenomenal. It looked like Winter wonderland, the service was great, the place was clean, food and drinks were fantastic. Definitely the place to host a party
If you want the best of everything, this is the place to see & be seen! The atmosphere is second to none. The staff is warm and hospitable. The food is delightful and the view is gorgeous!
Gorgeous venue. One of the best in the detroit area. Roostertail people are amazing and super helpful.If you are looking for a venue TRUST me look no more.
Had a great time! Food, presentation, drinks, decorations, and wait staff was top notch!
Great presentation and atmosphere with the holiday presentation...
AN AMAZING TIME!
Loved the decorations and variety of holiday food, drinks, and desserts!  Thanks for sharing.

I can not be more pleased. Our experience, from start to finish, was 1st Class, exceptional and beautiful.  The venue is elegant, the waterfront views are spectacular and the service was excellent.“Mother of the Bride”
Wonderful place to have events! Always a great and fun time!

My husband and I recently celebrated the most incredible day of our lives at the Roostertail on September 27, 2024. I can confidently say that there is no better venue for a wedding than this one. From my very first inquiry, their team was impressively responsive and accommodating. As soon as we stepped into the venue, we were captivated by the stunning view and the beautifully remodeled reception area. After a delightful conversation and tour with Nicole, we were convinced that this was the perfect place for our wedding! Nicole is such an upbeat, kind soul, she was a factor into why we booked with them! Nicole did go over all price point options that they offered to ensure we were going to have everything we wanted for our big day. Throughout the planning process and on the big day, Nicole and Colleen were exceptional with all things wedding planning.  Shawna also played a crucial role in ensuring everything ran smoothly and on schedule. Our guests have been raving about the venue, the breathtaking views, and the delicious food! The wait staff was nothing short of extraordinary and incredibly efficient. I wholeheartedly recommend the Roostertail for your wedding or any special event! Worth every penny! I lived out my princess dreams!
As always, over the top!! Great food, great drinks and especially GREAT PEOPLE!!! ABSOLUTELY LOVE YOU GUYS!!!

I attended as a client guest and when I say BLOWN AWAY! I'm so excited to host my organization's holiday party here in December. The venue, the team, and the staff were so amazing. Please, consider them for your next event!
Still a beautiful staple for the city. Have come here many times for many years. Tonite was absolutely beautiful to say the least😍 10/12

Roostertail was an exceptional wedding venue that exceeded our expectations. Nicole is the sweetest, most understanding, and caring venue coordinator there is. Their communication throughout the planning process was honest, fast, and professional, making the logistics seamless. The quality of their work and overall value were efficient, timely, and orderly - the schedule was strict and easy to follow, and they catered to not only the bride and groom, but our guests as well. We couldn't have asked for a better venue to host our special day.
Wow what a beautiful venue, it was gorgeous but a little difficult getting in as a vendor. Not a fun place to be as a vendor.With the right event the Roostertail can be a great place.
Nice place to have a party on the river.
Phenomenal

5/5 stars doesn't even seem like enough! This venue is so stunning and so well kept. I had my micro-wedding here this year and ALL of the staff that I had the pleasure of working with were genuinely incredible. Everyone was so friendly, so helpful, and such a sense of calm on a crazy day! Nicole, the event coordinator for the Roostertail, is a walking ray of sunshine. She was able to curate a package that was absolutely perfect for our micro wedding, she answered all of our tons of questions patiently, and she led us so well on our wedding day. All of the staff truly make the Roostertail feel so comfortable and homey, and they care for the space so well. I could not recommend this venue more!!

I photographed a mid day wedding here 9.14.24 and it was a wonderful venue to work with. The ceremony view with the river behind us was absolutely amazing. The event planner there Nicole , in addition to the staff were absolutely lovely not only with our clients but with my staff. The wedding reception was in the deck and club room which was the perfect size & space for this size wedding (40 people). I will definitely be recommending this venue to people in the future.

Attended my daughter’s wedding last Saturday. The Roostertail’s event staff lead by Shawna and Nicole were beyond wonderful and made the experience feel amazing and magical. Can’t say enough about the location, fabulous food and great personal service by the entire Roostertail team. Memories to last a lifetime. 💗

The Roostertail throws the best party around! Shawna and Ava absolutely killed the McGregor wedding and it was unmatched. It was so well planned that I have friends modeling their wedding plans after our party. Much love to the Roostertail FOREVER!!!

We had our wedding 8.30.24 at the Roostertail, and it was the most amazing experience! Every detail was taken care of by the staff. Shawna, our coordinator from the Roostertail, was so exceptional to work with. I didn’t have to worry about anything. I had literally more than a dozen people tell me it was the best wedding they had ever been to. I highly and emphatically recommend the Roostertail for any event!
Smoke them if you got them
Best place to party in Metro Detroit..!!Shawna is very helpful and easy to work with..!!Love going there all the time..!!

Gorgeous venue! So glad I was invited to bartend the Havana nights event this year! It was so much fun to work in the beautiful surroundings & I loved the fabulous energy the guests as well as the other staff provided!!!!!*FIVE STARS ACROSS THE BOARD!

We recently held an event at The Roostertail, and we had such a great time! The team there went above and beyond to make sure that everything went smoothly and was successful. Nicole was incredibly helpful and had as much passion for our event as we did. She made sure everything was beyond perfect for us and added several little touches to make us feel truly important.
Beautiful Venue! 💕

so far so good! We just booked our wedding at the roostertail and I couldn’t be more excited. Shawna is so sweet and welcoming. She is making sure our dream day becomes a reality. Stunning venue and great communication with their event planners.

Nice place off the river.  Great for events,  Just wish the White Party had a buffet spread other than  food trucks and there were only 2.  The cost is a bit steep.  Other than that the umbeince was nice off the water.

We LOVE the Roostertail - best party ever! Shawna and Ava are the best! They helped us with every detail and went above and beyond, and did it HAPPILY!! The McGregor wedding is being talked about weeks later of how cohesive the setting, timeline, decor, and food all were! Highly recommend!

We recently attended Davis & Meagan McGregor’s wedding celebration at The Roostertail. The venue was beautiful, and Ava and Shawna did an amazing job of making sure every aspect of the evening was special and fun for the newlyweds and the guests. The food was delicious and plentiful throughout the night, and beverages never stopped flowing. Creativity was another unique aspect of the party, with a cotton candy machine, dry ice specialty drinks, grownup milkshakes in candy-rimmed mugs, a mash potato bar served in martini glasses…I’m probably forgetting something because I was so busy enjoying everything!!
We had a great time at the Roostertail for the McGregor wedding celebration.  Shawna and Ava were the best and the details were so impressive. Be sure to get the boozy milkshakes and flaming coffee.

We had a wonderful experience at the Roostertail for my son's wedding party!  Shawna and Ava were very professional, organized and attentive.  They made sure that everything ran smoothly and created the perfect setting for the event.  The food and service were excellent and things like the flaming coffee bar and adult milkshakes added a fun flair!

Thank you Shawna & Team!!! Absolutely amazing job byeveryone at the Roostertail!!!My (now) wife & I had our wedding at The Roostertail June 2024 and couldn't have been more pleased with the way it was planned/coordinated/executed.They exceeded expectations in every way possible.I cannot recommend them highly enough!
Superb views for the McGregor wedding! Ava and team put together a seamless event.

Just traveled up from NC for a wedding reception here. Cant say enough great things about this place. The venue was awesome from an appearance and location standpoint. The staff were even better. I was in the wedding so got some behind the scenes insight into how they operate. Shawna and Ava were on top of everything. Two of the most welcoming and knowledgeable people I’ve met at an event like this. Really well run operation. The entire staff was incredible and we kept the bartenders busy to say the least. Can certainly validate their ability to keep up with an active crowd. I can’t recommend this place enough and huge shoutout to them for making the McGregor wedding such an unforgettable day.

The Roostertail is the most amazing venue! The view, the staff, the food, the history, the accommodations - it’s all perfect.My husband and I spent 6 months venue hunting for the perfect venue and we found it here! There are diet friendly foods, wonderful staff members (especially Nicole & Colleen!), incredible views, and so much more.Nicole, the event coordinator, is absolutely wonderful. She stayed the entire night on our big day and helped us through it all. She is helpful, kind, and enthusiastic about working together. She truly cares about every couple that walks through the door. She worked with our budget, helped talk through the whole process and the realities of wedding days, met all of our wants/needs, and was just overall wonderful !!We can’t say enough good things about The Roostertail. If you are thinking even a little bit about having your event here- please please just go tour it (&book it!) you won’t regret it!!

Amazing!!!   Absolutely amazing job done by the entire team at the Roostertail!!!My son and my new daughter-in-law celebrated their 200 guest wedding reception at the Roostertail and I cannot remember a better event that I have ever attended! The team at the Roostertail thought through every detail and executed at a 5-Star level.  The venue was immaculate and the views of the Detroit river were spectacular.The food was fantastic and the beverage service was on point.  All-in-all, they went over the top!I cannot recommend them highly enough!Richard McGregor

If you're thinking of having your wedding/reception at the Roostertail...do it! My husband and I got married there in May and it was absolutely perfect. The staff was so organized, welcoming, and helpful, and they made the planning process easy for us from start to finish. One huge perk about this venue is that their packages include everything (food, drinks, chairs, linens, etc.) and they even had a boxwood wall for rent that provided some great photo ops. Views of the river from the ceremony and reception (Palm River Room and deck) were gorgeous and look beautiful in our photos. Many of our guests also commented that the food was delicious. We want to give a huge shout out to Nicole for being an MVP on our big day! She made sure everything ran smoothly and worked side-by-side with our day of wedding planner to ensure our wedding day was just how we envisioned. I can't say enough good things about the Roostertail!
From start to finish an amazing experience.

Roostertail, thanks for an amazing 50th birthday party. It was Excellence from start to finish. Nicole and Colleen was so great to work with during the planning phase. The helped to keep me on track and ensured all my needs were met. They went above and beyond. The venue looked amazing and the team was so attentive and ensured everything went smoothly during the party. They added so many extra surprises to the event with no additional charge (loved the shrimp and asparagus!!). I absolutely loved everything and the shooting waterfalls were over the top!

The Roostertail is the absolute safest and best location to host the Senior Prom. Nicole worked with me for over and entire year to provide the experience of a lifetime for my students. My vision was not only fulfilled, my dreams were as well. Nicole and her team worked tirelessly to exceed all of my expectations and they absolutely did. The Roostertail staff know how to throw a party. From Robots, bubbles, beautiful views and awesome snacks… my students were too tired for after parties!Job well done! I’m infinitely grateful ☺️Oak Park High School Class of 2024Senior Sponsor

I had my wedding reception here recently and the experience here was nothing short of spectacular. From the months leading up to the reception, to the constant communications back and forth, as well as the reception itself, we were very pleased with the treatment that we received. They made a very stressful process significantly more manageable and feasible and we would pick this venue again if we had the chance!

My wife and I had our wedding there last week. Nicole helped us coordinate a perfect wedding that was completely stress free. She helped us coordinate from out of state. Highly recommend planning your event there

I had my wedding here on June 22nd and the reviews i heard from people were phenomenal. Everyone loved it, the service was excellent, anything I wanted they brought, they were very considerate and it was my dream wedding! I highly recommend

I recently (this past Saturday) attended my nephew’s wedding reception at the Roostertail, and I can’t say enough about how great the venue and the staff were. Perhaps the most beautiful venue I’ve ever been to, especially with the views of the riverfront, and the staff was exceptional as well. Special thanks to Shawna and Martin for their hospitality.

Most gorgeous wedding venue! So impressed by the staff from making the drinks to serving the food. Loved the hand signals by staff very impressive and high class! The food was delicious! All around best wedding venue!

Beautiful view, I was in a wedding reception, service was ok, it was over crowded, the waiter handed the dishes to the guests to put on the table, didn’t clean the table after the main course, we ate the cake while dirty plates and silverware still on the table.

As an Event Manager, I had the pleasure managing a wedding at The Roostertail this past Sunday. WOW! From the moment I walked in to do a site visit with Shawna I was thoroughly impressed. (Full Disclosure: this was a pop in, not planned and Shawna dropped everything to show us around. Not only was she helpful, she was incredibly knowledgeable and had a sense of pride that showed through in every word she spoke as she explained some of the history too!) The unique features of the facility, the architecture and the views are just the start. I don't think Shawna or her staff have no in their vocabulary. From the moment I set foot on site for the actual wedding day Shawna and her team (you know who you are) were ON IT! I've never worked with a staff that was so in sync. I am pretty obsessed with customer service in the Event & Food Service industry. I have to be, that is my job! At EVERY turn (even during set up, which they had already set up the items we left), the staff was THERE! I could go on and on and on. The food was spectacular too! Again, the PEOPLE were just FANTASTIC, well trained and HAPPY which is a true testament to GOOD Management. If you are looking for a unique space, great food, great service & location, location, location, CHECK out the Roostertail. Old-school hospitality is still alive at The Roostertail! Thank you to Shawna and her team. Well done. Highly, Highly recommended for anyone planning an event!

Roostertail was beyond our expectations for our wedding day. The food was absolutely delicious and all of our guests said it was one of the best wedding meals they had ever had. The customer service was outstanding!!! Nicole and her team were nothing short of amazing. Mikayla deserves her own special shout out she was wonderful and on top of everything we needed as a bride and groom.The rest of the team: Between bringing drinks and appetizers down to the bridal party while we took pictures, Making sure all of the family tables were taken care of, but also providing the same amount of excellent service to all our other guests. I wish we could live this day over and over! Thank you so much Roostertail for allowing us to have the best day/wedding at your beautiful venue.

We had our wedding reception on 6/29/24 at the Roostertail! The staff had went above and beyond to make our day so special. Shawna was soo fun to work with and she made all of the planning such a breeze!!! She is the best! The food was outstanding. I can’t recommend the Roostertail enough! Such a beautiful venue!!! Thank you for everything!
What a stunning wedding venue. The service, food and atmosphere were spot on. and the view 😍 we loved learning a bit of history about the spot too from the owner.

My husband and I got married at the Roostertail on 6/15/24! It was an incredible day and Nicole and her staff were so helpful throughout our entire wedding process. I definitely recommend the Roostertail for weddings and other events!

I had an amazing time at the Roostertail!Stunning location with a great view, amazing food, friendly bartenders, and warm ambience. But the best part about the Roostertail was hands down the venue staff. Nicole and Shawna were amazing to work alongside and helped make sure the night went perfectly according to plan! If you’re looking for a 2025/2026 Wedding Venue, you’re in the right place!
Old well kept building with beautiful views of the river. Plenty of paid parking

Roostertail was the venue of our dreams for our wedding, and I can't thank their incredible team enough for making our day perfect! We planned our wedding in less than a month, and they made it all happen seamlessly.A huge shoutout to Nicole, who was beyond patient and accommodating. She dealt with all my last-minute requests and meltdowns with such grace and kindness. Nicole pours her heart and soul into making things happen and made the whole experience so easy for us. I am truly going to miss her. She was more than just a coordinator; she became a therapist and friend.I also want to express my gratitude to Colleen, who assisted me with all the wedding details over the phone. Even though I never got the chance to meet her in person, she was so sweet and helpful. Another special mention goes to Makayla, who was amazing on the day of the wedding, helping with everything and ensuring everything went smoothly.We also had the pleasure of meeting Tom, the owner of the venue, who was such a sweet and humble man.The entire staff at Roostertail was incredibly helpful and attentive. Thanks to them, our wedding was truly a dream come true, and I never wanted it to end. If you're looking for a perfect wedding venue with a top-notch team, Roostertail is the place to go. I highly recommend them! I want to get married again just to work with this incredible team again LOL
Beautiful place and GOOD FOOD
Incredible wedding venue! Nicole and all the staff were A+. I highly recommend!  The venue is surrounded by water.  They went above and beyond the day of to make sure everything was perfect! 💕
I was the Planner for a luxury event recently held at the Roostertail. The teamwork of the staff was greatly appreciated, gorgeous view and good food!
I really enjoyed my cousins 25th Wedding Anniversary... The service and Venue was Beautiful!!

My husband and I had our wedding here 6/1/24 and the experience could not have possibly been any better. Shawna worked us answering all of our questions, reminding us of things we forgot, and guided us through the entire process. As someone who was not built for planning a wedding, Shawna made everything so much easier. It was the best day ever and everything was amazing. Highly recommend!!!
Beautiful venue, as always. Food was excellent. White staff was top notch.

We hosted our "In the Clouds" Prom at the Roostertail this year. From start to finish, Nicole worked with our staff every step of the way. She was extremely responsive and truly helped us make this Prom dream a reality for the Class of 2024. On the day of Prom, every single staff member there went above and beyond. They understood our theme and made sure to decorate the event space accordingly...from the blue tablecloths, to the bubbles, to the haze, to the blue and white trees, and hanging ceiling decor, it truly felt like we were in the clouds. The Roostertail blew us away with various surprises throughout the night that made the Prom an unforgettable one. The food, snacks, and desserts were talked about by all the students well after Prom was over. We can't say enough about everyone at Roostertail for making this Prom the best one yet!

We had such a fabulous experience working with Nicole and the wonderful staff at the Roostertail. They made every effort to ensure that our wedding reception went perfect and seamlessly. Nicole and staff were constantly checking in and keeping us on schedule throughout the evening, and they made sure to pay special attention to our close family and bridal party as well. I would definitely recommend working with them as a reception venue for others, especially since nothing can really beat that view :)
It’s really nice, but I just don’t get the name. You could’ve chose a better name.
Roostertail did a fantastic job for our daughter’s wedding.  Nicole was thorough & a pleasure to work with.  Ownership also checked in during the event.  Great place.

I attended the Pink Gala hosted by Mix 92.3. The only issue I encountered was entering the venue because I use a walker and the handicap was very steep and I was very nervous when I left.Service, food, and the atmosphere was exceptional!!
Nice place to hang out
Very nice place
My favorite place in Detroit! It was an amazing event and the Roster Tail is always on point!

Great venue. Probably the best wedding food I’ve had ever. Steak was medium, and green beans were fresh, crispy, and not overcooked at all. Good view. The only change I would have made would be to have the DJ booth off to the side, and not in the dead center of the main window with the fountain show.
It was a beautiful event, wonderful atmosphere!!! And a gorgeous location alrighty y’all enjoy your Sunday
I’ve lived in the metro Detroit area all my life and never knew this place existed, excellent service, great food, so glad I came!

I just had my wedding at the Roostertail last weekend and it was amazing!! Nicole was so kind to work with and eased my nerves when the weather was looking iffy outside! The timing, execution, and view of the Detroit River was perfect!! Definitely recommend this venue!
Wow good food good service beautiful venue
Very nice property  on the Detroit River. Amazing staff and salesperson Nichol went above and beyond our groups expectations!
Excellent food and service!  Beautiful place and appropriate place for BCBSM retiree get together lunch:)
I wish I could give this place more than 4 stars . The food is great here and staff is awesome.  The scenery of the Downtown Detroit is priceless

Rooster tail is such a beautiful venue! As a guest this building is beautiful to see for the first time. Lots of options with the balcony & ballroom. The best part in my opinion though is the incredible views of the lake at Clair. The staff were super friendly and helpful throughout the birthday party. The birthday and guests were overly happy with this venue. Looking forward to coming back here again. Thank you to Mike & Ava (the owners). You are the best! Best birthday party ever!
Awesome place to go.
Fantastic place for a corporate event. Nicole and the team were amazing!

As a wedding planner, having worked with numerous venues, my collaboration with Roostertail stands out as exceptional! The team's remarkable attention to detail, dedication, and passion ensured flawless execution from planning to the event itself.  I highly recommend to couples seeking the perfect setting. Working with their exceptional team was a pleasure, and I am confident they will surpass expectations and create lasting memories. Hope to go back soon!!

Ava went above and beyond to help me surprise my godfather. He and his band played an extended gig at the Roostertail back in the 1960's and to this day he speaks of it so fondly.I thought I'd reach out to the Roostertail team and see about getting him some Roostertail merchandise for Christmas, as I knew it would bring a smile to his face. Ava got back to me immediately and helped me realize my dream of surprising him. Not only did she send me the coolest socks to gift him, she was genuinely interested in hearing his story and helping me track down any photos of his band they may have in the archives.I was a complete stranger with a very random request when I emailed Roostertail, and Ava didn't hesitate for a second to help me out. Her genuine interest, proactive efforts, and personal touch made this more than just another gift. This is hospitality at its absolute best. I am so grateful to her and I highly recommend the Roostertail.

Anyone who visits the Roostertail knows about the beautiful venue and excellent view of the Detroit River, anyone who tours will hear about their straightforward pricing for hassle-free wedding packages, and, for us, the Roostertail delivered on everything they promised and more.  Our guests loved the venue and the food.  The gorgeous scenery made the day feel like a dream and it resulted in a lot of amazing photos to relive the day over and over again.  Most importantly, the venue is perfect to join everyone together and celebrate, whether that was living it up on the dance floor or a conversation on the quiet patio.If you are looking for a venue which can help reduce stress while delivering a high-quality experience, we highly recommend the Roostertail.  Leading up to the event, Nicole asks a lot of very thorough questions, provides clear directions on what is required, and offers a series of recommendations to make for an excellent wedding.  The Roostertail coordinated with our external vendors to ensure that we didn’t have to stress on the day of the event, and everything went smoothly with very little input from us which allowed us to focus on each other and our guests. Nicole was a true joy to work with during the entire process – we felt completely heard and taken care of, and ended up with a wedding that exceeded our dreams.
Great venue filled with history. ✨️Great atmosphere, food, and staff.Events are executed seamlessly. 🥂

The setting was nothing short of breathtaking, and it provided the perfect ambiance for our celebration.One of the standout features of our event was the food provided by the Roostertail. The appetizers and entree (Stuffed Chicken with Boursin Cheese)  were not only delicious but beautifully presented. Our guests raved about the culinary delights served at our event. The Roostertail's catering team exceeded our expectations.What truly set the Roostertail apart, however, was the exceptional service provided by their staff. From the moment we began planning our event, the Roostertail team demonstrated a level of attentiveness and dedication that went above and beyond. They worked tirelessly to ensure that our vision for the event became a reality.We were consistently impressed with the professionalism, kindness, and efficiency displayed by the entire Roostertail staff. From the planning stages to the execution of the event, they made the entire process seamless and enjoyable.We extend our heartfelt thanks to Mike Schoenith, Nicole Spicuzza, and the entire Roostertail team for making our event a resounding success. Your dedication and expertise have left a lasting impression on our organization, and we eagerly anticipate future collaborations. Thank you for helping us create a memorable and meaningful evening for our clients and supporters.

I just had my senior prom here last night and I have to say that I am appalled.When we purchased prom tickets, we gave our meal preference. This was so that the venue would have an exact count of who wanted what so they could make an adequate amount of food.Well, prom rolls around and our school shows up at Roostertail. We sit down for dinner. At around 7:50, the staff begins bringing out the first dinner option, a chicken marsala. They handed it out to everyone at our table of 10, and we (kindly) let them know that we had ordered the Alfredo. 10 minutes pass and every table surrounding us had received their Alfredo. Not our table.Another 20 minutes goes by and nothing.I informed a server of the situation and they brought out a small plate with a very small scoop of mashed potatoes and greenbeans, explaining that they were making more Alfredo and that it would be about 20 minutes. Okay, cool.30 minutes later, still nothing. Staff had cleaned up most tables and ushered the other students downstairs to the dance floor. I sat for another 5 minutes until they made me go downstairs with everyone else.At 8:58, I spoke to a manager about the situation. She informed me that they would make our food and it would be out in 20 minutes. That's what I had been hearing for the past hour. I was hungry and upset.Well, at 9:27 pm, my dinner was finally brought out to me.You would think that was the end of the problems, but it was not.While out near the dance floor, staff began urging kids to the dance floor. Then, an Emergency Alert played over the loudspeakers. I, and many other students, began to panic. We thought there was a genuine emergency. Our school staff was also unaware of the situation and also looked on in fear and confusion. After all of us were thoroughly confused and terrified, a staff member walked out with a robot costume on.Are you kidding me?Mind you, this was my senior PROM. Me, along with many other students, are relieved to be graduating high school just because we have been worried about our safety at school. Try growing up and going to school in a day and age where you are constantly seeing news about how kids your age were killed at their school.For a moment, I thought something terrible was going to happen to me.Who decided it was a good idea to fake an emergency just for it to be some lame gimmick??? It's the same as yelling "FIRE" in a movie theater.Overall, I had a terrible experience and I wasn't offered much sympathy by the staff, only the manager seemed to have the slightest ounce of sympathy for me during this situation.Maybe this venue is alright for birthday parties or weddings, but please, don't hold your high school prom here.

Nice, but disappointing!Just my opinion, but I expected more from the famous Roostertail. I was there for the first time for a wedding and had always heard GREAT things over the years. The wedding ceremony was on the dock area. Very nice environment. Sure, the loud boats in the background going by disrupted the ceremony a couple of times, but you sure can’t blame the Roostertail for that. It was still five-stars for the atmosphere and setting. After the ceremony, as we headed into the venue for the reception, one item I was a bit shocked on was the pavement before you entered the building. The pavement was in good condition, but the red paint on the pavement was extremely worn and faded. A five-star venue wouldn’t have it like that. We are talking a $50 gallon of paint, once a year. And for what you pay for this place, it was disappointing they aren’t on top of something so simple. The venue was a bit dated, but clean. Staff/servers were four stars. Some people of course were five star, but then some were two and three. Again, for what you pay, they should be able to pay well to have top notch serving staff. Bartenders - one five star fantastic expert, and one two-star. Seemed as if that bartender really didn’t know what they were doing. Maybe a new person, but it was clear they weren’t ready yet for the job. The biggest disappointment, and a heavily weighted two-stars, was the food. It was just ok. I expected great things with the food from what I had been told over the years. Maybe we just had a cooking staff who had a bad night, but nothing was all that great except for the rolls. The pasta dish was extremely bland. I mean bad. The rest was ok. Again, the food was ok, but for what you pay, I expect the food to be A LOT better. I did ask other tables what their thoughts were on the food, and the overwhelming response was it was “ok”. Not great, but not bad.A definite three-star venue. And when comparing to other venues I’ve been to for a wedding, keeping in mind the price, there are definitely other options where you get more for the money.

My husband had experience in the industry before we started planning our wedding, and he told me about how nice the Roostertail was. We then scheduled a visit, and I immediately fell in love! I couldn't wait to tell him that this location felt like "the one!"We took a very low maintenance approach to our planning - hoping to keep costs down and minimize the extras so we could focus on what really mattered. I was blown away at the affordable package we were offered that included the ceremony, food, and alcohol! I’m sure our car wasn’t the only one broken into. While you may think the Roostertail is a gorgeous event space, be aware of the area and the promoters of this space. Our daughter's wedding, originally planned for 10.10.20 in Grosse Pointe was rescheduled during the pandemic for 7.1.21. Sadly, in January of 2021, the venue announced a major renovation and moved all weddings outdoors to a tent. Six days before the wedding, the tent was damaged in a storm, creating the need for a very quick venue change. In stepped the Roostertail, just 3 days before the wedding! From the moment we met Nicole and Michael, they were confident, reassuring, and positive they could create a dream wedding in only a few days. With so little time to make changes and notify guests, we had to trust Nicole and Michael and leave all the details to them. They exceeded our expectations in EVERY POSSIBLE WAY!It is impossible to express the feeling walking into the Roostertail and then watching our daughter and son in law walk into the gorgeous Palm River room, with the absolutely breathtaking view. The entire staff was attentive, professional, and anticipated and met our needs before we even asked! Michael asked my favorite drink when we first met and ordered the malibu to make it, Nicole made sure I had that drink in hand all night long. The food was delicious and beautifully presented and received so many compliments. The owner, Tom Schoenith, even joined and shared stories and memories with our guests. During the evening they added a dry ice drink bar that was such a surprise and a hit with everyone! Guests were absolutely in awe of the Roostertail and their ability to create the night in a matter of days. Their attention to detail was incredible and they appeared to enjoy the night as much as we did. Nicole even created a slideshow of Lauren and Conner from Instagram pictures! Our only regret is that we didn't book the Roostertail from the start as their all inclusive package (food, cocktail hour, appetizers, premium bar, chiavari chairs, linens, table vases, outdoor covered ceremony deck overlooking the water, specialty drinks, and tax and gratuities) would have saved us time booking outside vendors and money.Thank you Nicole, Michael, Tom and all the Roostertail staff for making Lauren and Conner's dream wedding possible and truly better than they ever imagined it would be. 🥰

I've been to the Roostertail for my prom almost 20yrs ago and again last weekend for a wedding and it was even more beautiful than I remember! We had our wedding 6-20-2021, Father’s Day.Bronson and I had a long engagement and searched several other Detroit venues until we found The Roostertail. I'll be honest, we were a little hesitant about it as we ate lunch at Sinbads prior to our appointment with the venue. But, within seconds of walking into the Roostertail we knew immediately this was the place. STUNNING views all around, grand decorations, rising dance floor, and a ceremony location beautifully put outside. Needless to say, we booked! This was all before Covid.Planning for the wedding had its stressful times as Covid presented some unforeseen challenges.  The Roostertail was adjusting and adapting by the minute. This meant limited options and a lot of messaging, Zooming, and calling. The last few weeks before our wedding date Bronson and I decided to just give it to the Roostertail and let them do their thing. AND DID THEY!!!We put all of our trust into their recommended food selection of stuffed chicken with boursin cheese and spinach, mashed potatoes with a garlic sauce, green beans and the caesar salad. We never had a food tasting and went unknowingly into our wedding night. Our guests could not stop talking about the food, service, atmosphere, quality, and experience! Several of our guests had previously been to The Roostertail for high school proms or class reunions and had talked very highly of the venue. We knew our night would be magical and full of love with our friends and family. What we did not know was what quality and superior service The Roostertail would give it. Individual tables had personal service and their needs were delivered quickly!Nicole did a very good job as the day of coordinator. She made sure that we were punctual with our timing and we stayed organized to maximize our time with our guests. She made sure that we had everything we needed from a drink in our hand to a pen for our guest book. Our guest made several comments about the service at the Roostertail and how attentive Nicole was. We felt so well taken care of and not a single worry that night. Thank you Roostertail.What was really special about The Roostertail was how well the vendors worked together with Nicole and each other. After giving Nicole their numbers they were able to organize the venue and create the perfect environment and atmosphere for a wedding. This allowed us to focus on the day rather than the little details.The Rustic Root did a PHENOMENAL job with florals and went ABOVE AND BEYOND for us on our day. Lindsey is trustworthy and has such a creative eye! Her and her team created masterpieces for our day!Thank you Lindsay and The Rustic Root!!CCKing has done several events at The Roostertail and was INCREDIBLE with keeping our guests on the dance floor.. didI mention it rises for the first dance?! Tony!! You are the best! Thank you for keeping the party going!!You want to have the best wedding you, your future spouse, and your guest will ever have? Choose The Roostertail as your venue, The Rustic Root for florals, Chocolate Bar cafe for mini desserts, and CC King for DJ. Best day of my life! Thank you ALL!

We had a torrential downpour/storm almost immediately after the wedding ceremony & were stranded on the deck but they brought out umbrellas/helped us dry off/put coats in dryers, etc!. 2. I spilled an ENTIRE GLASS OF RED WINE on my dress, and the staff immediately assisted me and helped me to get everything out. Overall, we were so incredibly happy with our initmate wedding/reception and with Nicole and the entire staff at Roostertail. Our 13 person event felt so incredibly special & they definitely pulled out all of the stops to make us feel special, including Mr. Schoenith who really assisted in our intimate event! I have attended the Detroit Derby Brunch at the Roostertail the past 3 years.  This would have been my fourth year but Covid happened.  The event was moved to September.  Labor day weekend to be exact.  I tried to get a refund since this was not a good date for us and was told no funds were available to refund.  Fast forward to now and I am being told by the event organizer that she paid 30k to this venue to host the event for 400 people.  The venue is now stating that due to current conditions they can only host 100 and credit the organization for a future event that no monies will be refunded.  They have over 30k and refuse to refund the money but are not able to do the duties outlined in the original event.  On top of this the venue which claims they are navigating in this new world and trying to accommodate people booked fairly, they obtained tax payer funded loans under the Cares Act.  Shame on them refusing to give back money for an event they can't provide.

When my husband and I signed the contract for the Roostertail, we knew we had picked the best venue!In January of 2019, I contacted the Roostertail and had the honor to speak with Nicole.  My fiancée (now husband) and I met with her in February and we discussed the many options and great packages that the Roostertail had to offer.  My husband and I, overwhelmed in a positive way, were able to walk away with a contract that we could afford, with all of the “bells and whistles” that we wanted to have!  I visited the Roostertail many times from February until our wedding day December 28, for meetings, suggestions, consultations, and brainstorming so that my dream could become a reality.  Nicole was always very helpful, had many suggestions, recommendations, ideas, and really took an active interest in helping my husband and I have the wedding of our dreams!  She was always available to talk to, and she was always very thorough and positive.  Not only was Nicole the perfect person to work with but also was the entire staff.  Whenever I entered the building, everyone was helpful, pleasant, and excited for my husband and I about our day.On our wedding day, December 28, 2019, THE ENTIRE STAFF was pleasant, helpful, and accommodating.  My guests are still telling us how nice and professional the staff was and how nice the venue was.  From coat check, to the buffet, to bathroom attendants, to wait staff, the entire Roostertail staff made my husband and I wedding day one that we will never forget!  We enjoyed them so much, we are thinking about the next event we want to have at the Roostertail.  I am so glad that we chose to have one of the most important days of our lives at the Roostertail.  No other venue compared (we went to many), and no other venue was so accommodating and welcoming!  Nicole, we thank you so much for ALL THAT YOU DID FOR US, we will see you soon!  Thanks again!Maegan and Aaron Barnes

It’s hard to put into words how incredible Nicole and the entire Roostertail team is.  Last year, John (my now husband) and I met with Nicole to inquire about having our wedding reception at the Roostertail.  When people say they know the moment they walk into a venue, it’s the place for them, this is exactly how John and I felt.  After one meeting with Nicole, we knew this was where we wanted to spend one of the most important days of our lives celebrating with our closest family and friends.  Before we had anything finalized Nicole created a texting group chat with her, John and I titled, ‘John & Deana NYE 2018 Wedding.’  Seeing something as simple as this made us so excited and we felt so special.  From our first encounter with Nicole we felt truly cared about and we loved that she was just as excited as we were.  We said YES to the Roostertail.  This was one of the easiest and best decisions we have ever made.Throughout the entire planning process, Nicole was always there to answer phone calls, text messages, and emails promptly. I can honestly say, I did not have any worries and/or anxiety about the wedding because I trusted her 100%.  I enjoyed the most important day in my life, worry-free because of Nicole.  I know not every bride can say that.  Nicole and the entire Roostertail team were flawless. They included several surprises the night of our wedding, which we are forever grateful for.  The food was delicious, the drinks were perfect, and all the staff members were extremely accommodating.  The owner of the Roostertail was on sight the night of our wedding and personally came over to John and I congratulating us, making sure we were good. Remarkable customer service!  We have received endless compliments about the evening from our guests.  Our New Year’s Eve wedding was so magical, something out of a movie! I honestly could not imagine planning our wedding without Nicole and recommend her and the Roostertail team with no reservations. We look forward to attending future Roostertail events!

Having our cocktail hour directly on the Detroit river is what has left our guests raving. As the sun went down, the fountain, which is located in the back of the Roostertail over looking the River, was going off and lighting up the back of the venue. My husband and I interviewed all five star venues in the Metro Detroit area, and we settled on the Roostertail because there was not one thing they would not accommodate for us.
